<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Cloud.ru](https://cloud.ru) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/cloudru/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "cloudru"
  dnsCredentials:
    # CLOUDRU_KEY_ID: Key ID (login)
    keyID: ""
    # CLOUDRU_SECRET: Key Secret
    secret: ""
    # CLOUDRU_SERVICE_INSTANCE_ID: Service Instance ID (parentId)
    serviceInstanceID: ""
    # CLOUDRU_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # CLOUDRU_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 5)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # CLOUDRU_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 300)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # CLOUDRU_SEQUENCE_INTERVAL: Time between sequential requests in seconds (Default: 120)
    sequenceInterval: ""
    # CLOUDRU_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
